caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

This fairytale restaurant in Lakeland, Florida, is a local favorite. Be sure to check it out next time your in Lakeland to be transported to another place 🧚🏻‍♀️ 

#florida #lakeland #fairytale
#fairytaleplaces #storybook #romantic #magical #tudor #hiddengems #travelgram #travel

transcription.text: Fairytale Places in Florida Part 1. Welcome to Cobbin Pen in Lakeland, Florida. This fairytale restaurant started out as the Tudor House built in 1927. Then, in 2016, the house was moved to where it is now and became the fairytale restaurant Lakelanders have come to love. Fun fact, it's well known that Elvis visited the Tudor House in the 1970s and likely sat in one of these rooms. Be sure to save this post and follow for more Fairytale Places in Florida.
